{{Apostles
|realm=Hellas
|card=Olive Branch
|numareas=12
|apostles={{Apostle
|apostle=Acting Manager of Aries
|area=Aries
|apostleatk=73263
|apostledef=58667
|apostlehp=191668
|apostleweak=ART 14468
|apostlespecial=HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +90m}}, Pot of Sealing
|minion1=Sheep No.1
|minion1atk=71863
|minion1def=57546
|minion1hp=185538
|minion1weak=AFFCT 4550
|minionspecial=HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|minionreward={{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1,220}}, INTEL +460
|minion2=Sheep No.2
|minion2atk=AFFCT 72003
|minion2def=57658
|minion2hp=186151
|minion2weak=AFFCT 74629
|minion3=Sheep No.3
|minion3atk=72143
|minion3def=57770
|minion3hp=186764
|minion3weak=AFFCT 74708
|minion4=Sheep No.4
|minion4atk=72283
|minion4def=57882
|minion4hp=187377
|minion4weak=AFFCT 74788
|minion5=Sheep No.5
|minion5atk=72423
|minion5def=57995
|minion5hp=187986
|minion5weak=AFFCT 74867
|minion6=Sheep No.6
|minion6atk=72563
|minion6def=58107
|minion6hp=188599
|minion6weak=AFFCT 749446
|minion7=Sheep No.7
|minion7atk=72703
|minion7def=58219
|minion7hp=189213
|minion7weak=AFFCT 75025
|minion8=Sheep No.8
|minion8atk=72843
|minion8def=58331
|minion8hp=189826
|minion8weak=AFFCT 75104
|minion9=Sheep No.9
|minion9atk=72913
|minion9def=58387
|minion9hp=190133
|minion9weak=AFFCT 75144
|minion10=Sheep No.10
|minion10atk=72983
|minion10def=58443
|minion10hp=190440
|minion10weak=AFFCT 75183
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Philip II
|area=Taurus
|apostleatk=75244
|apostledef=60014
|apostlehp=541069
|apostleweak=FTH 15231
|apostlespecial=HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +90m}}
|minion1=Macedonian Priest
|minion1atk=73123
|minion1def=58555
|minion1hp=521056
|minion1weak=AFFCT 77463
|minionspecial=HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|minionreward={{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1,260}}, INTEL +480
|minion2=Macedonian Soldier
|minion2atk=73716
|minion2def=59106
|minion2hp=527839
|minion2weak=AFFCT 77780
|minion3=Macedonian Mage
|minion3atk=74274
|minion3def=59406
|minion3hp=533239
|minion3weak=AFFCT 78020
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Ramu and Remu
|area=Gemini
|apostleatk=79135
|apostledef=62100
|apostlehp=560406
|apostleweak=ART 15409
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +100m}}
|apostlespecial=HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|minion1=Remu
|minion1atk=74974
|minion1def=59851
|minion1hp=539039
|minion1weak=AFFCT 78263
|minionspecial=HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|minionreward={{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1,280}}, INTEL +490
|minion2=Ramu
|minion2atk=76901
|minion2def=60946
|minion2hp=551386
|minion2weak=AFFCT 78763
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Magic Crab
|area=Cancer
|color=green
|apostleatk=85628
|apostledef=65180
|apostlehp=584292
|apostleweak=FAME 15606
|apostlespecial=HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +100m}}
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Leonida
|area=
|color=green
|apostleatk=95278
|apostledef=69451
|apostlehp=619011
|apostleweak=CIV 15823
|apostlespecial=HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +110m}}
|minion1=Spartan Warrior
|minion1atk=84846
|minion1def=64822
|minion1hp=581514
|minion1weak=AFFCT 80023
|minionspecial=HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|minionreward={{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1,280}}, INTEL +490
|minion2=Spartan Warrior
|minion2atk=87286
|minion2def=65932
|minion2hp=590120
|minion2weak=AFFCT 80307
|minion3=Spartan Warrior
|minion3atk=90996
|minion3def=67582
|minion3hp=602939
|minion3weak=AFFCT 80696
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Miss Beard
|area=Virgo
|color=blue
|apostleatk=108658
|apostledef=75109
|apostlehp=671545
|apostleweak=FAME 16064
|apostlespecial=HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +2h}}
|minion1=Muscular Barbie
|minion1atk=94148
|minion1def=68960
|minion1hp=614428
|minion1weak=AFFCT 80994
|minionspecial=HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|minionreward={{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1,300}}, INTEL +500
|minion2=Muscular Maiden
|minion2atk=100163
|minion2def=71549
|minion2hp=638514
|minion2weak=AFFCT 81506
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Aristotle
|area=Libra
|color=blue
|apostleatk=126219
|apostledef=82207
|apostlehp=737834
|apostleweak=TECH 16331
|apostlespecial=HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +130m}}
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Scorpion Lord
|area=Scorpio
|color=blue
|apostleatk=148583
|apostledef=90857
|apostlehp=812704
|apostleweak=FTH 16625
|apostlespecial=HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +140m}}
|minion1=Siren
|minion1atk=124528
|minion1def=81430
|minion1hp=730511
|minion1weak=AFFCT 83152
|minionspecial=HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|minionreward={{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1,300}}, INTEL +500
|minion2=Medusa
|minion2atk=132393
|minion2def=84635
|minion2hp=759842
|minion2weak=AFFCT 83621
|minion3=Chimera
|minion3atk=139017
|minion3def=87204
|minion3hp=781525
|minion3weak=AFFCT 83982
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Dark Ranger
|area=Sagittarius
|color=purple
|apostleatk=176507
|apostledef=10155
|apostlehp=903035
|apostleweak=FAME 16948
|apostlespecial=HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +150m}}
|minion1=Light Ranger
|minion1atk=146110
|minion1def=89919
|minion1hp=804660
|minion1weak=AFFCT 84350
|minionspecial=HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|minionreward={{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1,320}}, INTEL +510
|minion2=Wind Ranger
|minion2atk=156337
|minion2def=93769
|minion2hp=837891
|minion2weak=AFFCT 84853
|minion3=Demon Lord of Fear
|minion3atk=164613
|minion3def=96832
|minion3hp=864687
|minion3weak=AFFCT 85240
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Baphomet
|area=Capricorn
|color=purple
|apostleatk=210969
|apostledef=113194
|apostlehp=1017394
|apostleweak=FTH 17302
|apostlespecial=HIT +70, Paralysis RES +70%
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +160m}}

|minion1atk=173438
|minion1def=100049
|minion1hp=893151
|minion1weak=AFFCT 85635
|minionspecial=HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|minionreward={{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1,320}}, INTEL +510
|minion2=Imp
|minion2atk=179640
|minion2def=102280
|minion2hp=913092
|minion2weak=AFFCT 85903

|minion3atk=186107
|minion3def=104580
|minion3hp=933842
|minion3weak=AFFCT 86175
|minion3=Imp
|minion4=Imp
|minion4atk=192848
|minion4def=106952
|minion4hp=955389
|minion4weak=AFFCT 86450
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Socrates
|area=Aquarius
|color=purple
|apostleatk=253290
|apostledef=127057
|apostlehp=1162216
|apostlespecial=HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|apostleweak=CIV 17688
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +170m}}
}}{{Apostle
|apostle=Pythagoras
|area=Pisces
|color=orange
|apostleatk=264209
|apostledef=131022
|apostlehp=1249342
|apostleweak=TECH 17850
|apostlespecial=HIT +70, Paralysis RES +70%
|1streward={{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +500
|dominatereward={{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +3h}}
|minion1=Merman Guard
|minion1atk=244118
|minion1def=124135
|minion1hp=1131129
|minion1weak=AFFCT 88333
|minionspecial=HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|minionreward={{RewardIconWithText|B-tad, +1,320}}, INTEL +510
|minion2=Merman Guard
|minion2atk=258020
|minion2def=128547
|minion2hp=1178168
|minion2weak=AFFCT 88719
|minion3=Merman Guard
|minion3atk=262849
|minion3def=130056
|minion3hp=1194405
|minion3weak=AFFCT 88800
}}}}
